title: fagarastrum capense
intro: Fagarastrum capense is a plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family, commonly known as the citrus family. It is native to South Africa and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties. The plant's roots and bark contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. Fagarastrum capense is traditionally prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it can also be used in the form of a tincture or topical cream, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
